tasks.title: Family tasks
tasks.emptyHint: Tasks are created by an Agent with the miloco plugin (e.g. OpenClaw); they'll show up here once created
tasks.confirmDeleteMessage: Delete "{{desc}}"? The task and its rules and records will be removed and cannot be recovered.
tasks.noRules: No linked rules yet (may still be waiting for the Agent to wire it up)
tasks.rulesManagedHint: Rules and push notifications are created and managed by the Agent; chat with it to adjust.
tasks.howToTitle: Want to add a task? Just tell the Agent
tasks.howToBody: Tasks are created — and their perception rules wired up — by an Agent with the miloco plugin (e.g. OpenClaw), not by the web app. Just chat with that Agent and describe what you want in one sentence, for example send it the line below:
tasks.example1: Help me watch that my kid practices piano 30 minutes a day and remind me when done
tasks.example2: Remind the elder at home to measure blood pressure once a day
tasks.promptDialogHint: Copy the text below and send it to an Agent with the miloco plugin (e.g. OpenClaw); it will create and wire up the task for you.
tasks.copyFail: Couldn't copy, please select the text manually
